concepts_used.title: 模型假设的写法
concepts_used.how_used: 论文列出了11条假设，每条都附有详细理由，例如假设医院在每个区域、呼叫按人口均匀分布等，为后续建模奠定基础。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: Assumptions with Justification: 1. Table 1 given in the problem reads with the right-most column indicating the starting zone... 2. The location of an ambulance within a zone does not matter... 3. This scenario occurs in a county in the United States of America. 4. There is a hospital in every zone. 5. Only hospitals are capable of taking care of the patients rescued by the ambulances. 6. Calls are equally distributed by population and over time. 7. Ambulances take calls and attend to calls 24/7, and operate with maximum efficiency. 8. Ambulances attend all calls, even illegitimate ones. 9. Ambulances return to their station before going after a new call. 10. Any catastrophe that occurs affects the whole county equally, harming the same percentage of citizens in each zone. 11. During catastrophe scenarios, the only support from other parties other than the ESC will be guaranteed gove

concepts_used.title: 引言写作方法
concepts_used.how_used: 论文在开头部分清晰陈述了问题重述（Restatement of the Problem）和摘要（Summary），概述了研究目标、方法和主要结论。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: Restatement of the Problem: Given information about the time required by an ambulance to travel between any two districts, and a table of population in each zone, we will find out which zones ambulances should be stationed in to cover as much of the population as possible within 8 minutes. ... Summary: Based on the given information of time taken to travel from one zone to another, we created a model of the optimum configurations of three, two, and one ambulances in the county...

concepts_used.title: 最短路径算法（Dijkstra、Floyd）
concepts_used.how_used: 论文利用给定的区域间旅行时间数据，构建了6个区域间的有向图，并隐含地使用最短路径（旅行时间）来判断8分钟内能否覆盖，从而筛选出可行的救护车配置。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: Based on the given information of time taken to travel from one zone to another, we created a model of the optimum configurations of three, two, and one ambulances in the county... analyzing the given data to see which ambulances could reach which zones within 8 minutes, to see which configurations could actually cover all 6 zones of the county.

concepts_used.title: 加权求和评价
concepts_used.how_used: 论文通过计算每种配置覆盖的人口百分比（加权求和）来评估配置优劣，最终选择覆盖人口最多的配置。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: With the remaining three ambulances that we determined to cover the same amount of people, we decided the optimum configuration through comparing the spare minutes of each ambulance, with the configuration being placing ambulances in zones 2, 4, and 6, with 97.7% of the people being covered and 6250 people left uncovered.

concepts_used.title: 灵敏度分析
concepts_used.how_used: 论文在灾难场景中测试了不同操作策略（如“disaster-saver”方法）对覆盖人口的影响，实质上进行了灵敏度分析，比较了不同策略下的覆盖效果。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: We continued by trying multiple methods for three ambulances to tackle disasters, and we discovered that the best way to operate the ambulances in its stations was to use the “disaster-saver” method where an ambulance would go to a closest zone and operate there until all calls were dealt with before returning to its original zone. This method covered up to 94.1% of the people but left at least 16,045 people uncovered.

concepts_used.title: 如何从数据中提取结论
concepts_used.how_used: 论文通过计算覆盖人口百分比和未覆盖人数，从数据中提取结论，判断不同数量救护车能否覆盖全区域，并给出最终建议。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: Three ambulances covered 97.7% of the people and left 6250 people uncovered... Two ambulances covered 77.55% of the people and left 60,615 uncovered... One ambulance covered 45.83% of the people and left 146,259 people uncovered... we determined that the ESC alone would not be able to cover a catastrophic event did occur.

concepts_used.title: 模型改进与推广部分
concepts_used.how_used: 论文在灾难场景部分参考了日本、俄亥俄州凯霍加县、圣地亚哥等地的案例研究，提出了改进建议，并最终撰写备忘录总结推荐方案。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: In addition, with the information gathered from researching case studies in places including Japan, Cuyahoga of Ohio, and San Diego, we discovered methods for the county or state to be prepared for catastrophes including floods, earthquakes, and hurricanes. Finally, we ended by writing a memo outlining our recommendations from our model and analysis finding for the ESC.
